title: Disposable fireball
description: A Throwable Fireball, what you can throw away to infinity
body:
![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b77adcf9e2c25729138a417eaff6524fad50700.png)

🧨 What does it do?
This mod introduces a custom item that, when thrown, behaves like a Ghast fireball.
You can launch it at any distance, making it perfect for:

Blasting mobs from afar

Setting things on fire 🔥

Causing chaos (responsibly, of course 😈)

🎯 Key Features
🔥 Throwable Fireball item — toss it like a snowball, burn like a Ghast

📏 Unlimited range — wherever your aim lands, the fireball goes

💡 Creative mode friendly — ideal for minigames or fun survival challenges

🧪 No dependencies — works on its own!

🛠️ Compatibility
This mod is a Forge mod

Minecraft versions: 1.20.1

📦 How to Use
Get the item (via creative inventory or command)

Right-click to throw

Watch the fire fly and things go boom 💥
